Against Defendant Loy Tsang And/Or His Counsel Of Record, San Francisco City Attorney Office, In The Amount Of $6,460.00

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-21-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND LOY TSANG'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearances:
Oliver Fong of the Office of the City Attorney (415.554.3906, oliver.fong@sfcityatty.org) for defendants and moving parties;
Caitlin Pacheco of Carpenter & Zuckerman (310.273.1230, eservice@cz.law) appearing via Zoom for plaintiff and opposing party.

Argued and the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants the City and County of San Francisco and Loy Tsang's demurrer to the First Amended Complaint is overruled. The FAC adequately apprises defendants that this cause of action arises out of a motor vehicle accident, it specifies the day, time, and location, and it pleads that Tsang was negligent. No further particularity is required. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
